name: Ava George Stewart
bio: Ava George Stewart received unanimous Qualified ratings from the Alliance bar associations, with two Highly Recommended ratings, and a Recommended from the CBA. She is among the most positively rated candidates in the 2026 Cook County judicial elections. She is running uncontested.
background: Attorney with strong bar association endorsements across the board.

bar_ratings.alliance_detail: Qualified unanimous + 2 Highly Recommended from Alliance bar associations
